title: codonoboea corneri
intro: Codonoboea corneri, also known as the "Tobacco Plant" or "Wild Tobacco", is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its high concentration of nicotine and other alkaloids. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Codonoboea corneri can be consumed as a tea or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
